extension.summary: HebScout Skin - Estuary with Hebrew subtitle & audio OSD buttons
עור HebScout - Estuary עם כפתורי כתוביות ושמע בנגן
extension.description:
A modified Estuary skin with custom player OSD buttons: - Hebrew subtitle picker (בחירת כתוביות) - Audio track switcher (החלף שמע) - Skip intro/recap (דלג על הפתיח)
Based on Kodi's default Estuary skin. Switch to this skin to get HebScout player integration.
